## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- **XDC Node Setup Version**: [e.g. 2.0.0]
- **Node Type**: [e.g. validator, rpc, archive]
- **Client**: [e.g. XDPoSChain, erigon-xdc]
- **Network**: [e.g. mainnet, testnet]

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, and screenshots if applicable.

## Logs
```bash
# Paste relevant logs here
```

## Configuration
```yaml
# Paste relevant configuration if applicable
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have tested with the latest version
- [ ] I can reproduce this consistently

## Possible Solution
If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug, please describe them here.
